Four quick rules

Follow these on every post and you're good to go.

1

Say it's a partnership

Add the hashtag on screen and in your caption so it's clear you're partnering with MuscleTech.

#MuscleTechPartner
2

Stick to the label

Only repeat claims printed on the product. Say "supports" or "may help" — never "guaranteed" or anything medical.

3

Tag the product

Link the exact MuscleTech item in your video so people can buy it in two taps.

4

No health promises

Skip weight-loss guarantees, disease talk, or dosing advice. Keep it about your routine and how you feel.
